title: Research DocuSeal fork network for integrable features; report + epics/issues
Completion watermark (timestamp + SHA-256 hash) on signed documents — DocuSign parity
description: Stamp every page of completed/signed documents with a bottom footer: Document ID + completion timestamp (UTC) + SHA-256 hash of the pre-stamp signed PDF bytes. On by default, account-config toggle. Design doc: docs/plans/2026-07-13-completion-watermark-design.md

title: Core watermark stamping in GenerateResultAttachments (hash + timestamp + ID footer, metadata)
description: In lib/submissions/generate_result_attachments.rb build_pdf_attachment: serialize filled PDF, SHA-256 the bytes, draw 2-line footer on every page (HexaPDF overlay canvas, white underlay), store watermark_sha256 in attachment metadata. Stack above signature-ID stamp when both enabled. TDD: new spec/lib/submissions/generate_result_attachments_spec.rb

title: Account config toggle (with_completion_watermark, default on) + esign settings UI + i18n
description: New AccountConfig::WITH_COMPLETION_WATERMARK_KEY, default enabled (value != false). Toggle in app/views/esign_settings/show.html.erb mirroring with_signature_id pattern. i18n labels for all locales in config/locales/i18n.yml

title: Audit trail: record stamped watermark SHA-256 for verification
description: Show metadata['watermark_sha256'] in the documents table of Submissions::GenerateAuditTrail so the stamped hash is verifiable against a trusted record

title: Epic: Fork-network quick-win fixes (Tier 1)
Epic: Fork-maintenance hardening (Tier 2 — overlay/sync/guards)
Epic: Fork-network integrations & features (Tier 3)
Epic: Pro-feature reimplementations — licensing-gated (Tier 4)
Port R2/MinIO S3 checksum compat to storage.yml (s24407-pj 54395568fe)
description: Add request_checksum_calculation: when_required + response_checksum_validation: when_required under aws_s3.upload in config/storage.yml. Fixes aws-sdk-ruby v3 CRC32 checksums breaking Cloudflare R2/MinIO/B2. Verified absent upstream. See docs/reports/docuseal-fork-network-research.md 1.1

title: Fix next-signer notification stall in preserved order (usehelloai 0d2a9a4faf)
description: process_submitter_completion_job.rb enqueue_next_submitter_request_notification: drop sent_at.blank? from next-submitter predicate. Verify Submitters.send_signature_requests idempotency first (duplicate-invitation risk). Report 1.2

title: Enable Devise :lockable brute-force protection on sign-in (vshaveyko)
description: Uncomment/set devise.rb lockable config: lock_strategy :failed_attempts, maximum_attempts 10, unlock_strategy :both, unlock_in 1.hour. DB columns already exist upstream. Report 1.3

title: Guard unguarded ENV.fetch SMTP_FROM KeyError in ActionMailerConfigsInterceptor (docuseal-plus)
description: Add default to ENV.fetch(SMTP_FROM) which raises KeyError when unset. Verified still unguarded upstream. Report 1.4

title: Add SMTP_ENABLE_SSL/SMTP_ENABLE_TLS env toggles for implicit-TLS SMTP (shoaibanjam 1e3df9add)
description: Add ssl:/tls: keys to production smtp_settings from env. Needed for port-465 implicit TLS providers. Verify surrounding keys when porting. Report 1.5

title: Fix expired S3 presigned preview images via proxy_path in views (jamierowe 30ae5a1ea)
description: Swap preview img .url(time:) for ActiveStorage::Blob.proxy_path in submissions/show + submit_form/show. Do NOT take global Attachment#url override. Report 1.6

title: Raise PDF preview render quality (vshaveyko: MAX_WIDTH 2200, truecolor PNG)
description: lib/templates/process_document.rb MAX_WIDTH 1400->2200 env-overridable PAGE_MAX_WIDTH; drop palette quantization. Verify page.write_to_buffer var scope vs current upstream. Larger blob tradeoff. Report 1.7

title: Fix duplicate separator in email attribution footer (Intebec a39fd1b)
description: Remove duplicated separator in shared/_email_attribution.html.erb. Verify still reproduces on current upstream. Report 1.8

title: Bound RecordNotUnique retry + remove hardcoded sidekiq max_retries=13 (docuseal-plus)
description: ProcessSubmitterCompletionJob create_completed_submitter!: bare rescue/retry -> MAX 5 attempts w/ backoff; sidekiq_embed.rb let sidekiq.yml govern retries. VERIFY current upstream still has unbounded versions first. Report 1.9

title: Add Sidekiq death_handlers logging for exhausted-retry jobs (usehelloai)
description: Optional observability: log dead jobs to Rails.logger in sidekiq initializer. Report 1.10

title: Adopt overlay/heal-patches/fingerprint/sync-canary toolkit (Deenyoro pattern)
description: Port apply-overlay.sh (rsync --ignore-existing + marker .append blocks + patches), heal-patches.sh (check -> 3way -> fuzzy, regenerate drifted patches), upstream-fingerprints.txt (file::substring anchors), sync-canary.sh + daily GH Actions workflow that simulates next upstream merge and opens/closes an issue. Adapt to this fork carried changes. Report 2.1

title: Add fork-invariants CI guard: config/fork_invariants.yml + bin/fork-check (wabolabs)
description: Declarative must_exist/must_not_exist/must_contain/forbidden_globally manifest with why: fields; stdlib Ruby checker wired into CI so upstream merges cannot silently revert carried changes. Report 2.2

title: Add pre-push guard against pushing to docusealco upstream (wabolabs)
description: .githooks/pre-push refusing pushes to docusealco/* remotes + bin/install-push-guard (core.hooksPath + strip upstream push URL). Report 2.3

title: Add sync-upstream discipline: rerere script + scheduled sync PR workflow + tag mirror
description: bin/sync-upstream <tag> with git rerere; daily sync-upstream.yml opening PRs (acul021/s24407-pj models); mirror upstream release tags for Docker versioning. Report 2.4

title: Improve Docker CI: GHCR publishing, split webpack/native-arch build, layer caching
description: GHCR versioned+latest tags, workflow_dispatch, lowercase owner (Baw-Appie); prebuild webpack assets once + per-arch native builds + GHA cache (acul021); s256 hardened pipeline (cosign/SBOM/pinned actions) as reference. Report 2.5

title: Port request-changes-on-completed-submission (CareerPlug PRs 11/39/61)
description: changes_requested_at column, status rollback, changes_requested_email mailer, form.changes_requested webhook, PDF/audit regeneration on re-completion. Port API controller near-verbatim; re-derive submitter.rb state hooks vs current upstream; decouple from their iframe auth. ~500 LOC of specs exist upstream-side to adapt. Report 3.1

title: Port generic Pre-fill Options layer lib/prefill (CareerPlug PRs 10/12/16)
description: Semantic field-name slots mapped to field UUIDs, auto-populate on form open, submitter values win, cached. lib/prefill/* + ~1000 LOC specs port near-verbatim; re-anchor field_settings.vue dropdown + controller call-sites. Report 3.2

title: Port submission export service ExportLocation/ExportService (CareerPlug PRs 2/8)
description: Push rollup submission state + values + events to configurable external REST endpoint on submitter status change. Evaluate vs extending existing webhook serializers first. Report 3.3

title: Port paperless-ngx completed-document archival integration (s256 PRs 13/15)
description: Upload combined PDF + audit trail to paperless-ngx on completion; env-gated PAPERLESS_NGX_URL/TOKEN; bg job w/ retry; status widget. 417+ LOC specs included. Only shared conflict = 4-line completion-job hook. Report 3.4

title: Port Twenty CRM completed-document integration (s256 PR 16)
description: Submitter metadata twenty_company_id -> upload signed PDF + audit trail as CRM company attachments. Env-gated; ~727 LOC specs. Mirrors paperless pattern; shared completion-job hook. Report 3.4

title: Port pluggable field detection system (developbob PR 6)
description: Split-button in builder: ML autodetect + deploy-time algorithm profiles (Ruby plugins or YAML anchor/absolute positioning). 27 passing specs. Add memoization for per-load Dir.glob; ensure plugin dir not user-writable (Kernel#load). Report 3.5

title: Port Documents unified view (maximus-output)
description: Single Documents page: folders -> sent submissions -> drafts; root redirect; DocumentsController + view reusing existing partials; system specs updated. Re-verify reused partials vs current upstream. Report 3.6

title: Add DOCX->PDF conversion via LibreOffice with per-conversion profile isolation
description: Upstream OSS accepts DOCX types but raises InvalidFileType. Add soffice --convert-to pdf in create_attachments.rb with --env:UserInstallation per-conversion isolation (CraigIG4 c2b23845e) + actionable missing-LibreOffice error. Alpine: apk add libreoffice openjdk-jre-headless (~400MB image cost). Mild Pro-overlap flag. Report 3.7

title: Port DOCUSEAL_CONFIG_* env-override config infra + external SMTP/storage config (developbob)
description: Env-var overrides for account configs with locked_by_env? UI locking; lib/external_config.rb SMTP/storage externalization + read-only settings pages + can_send_emails? detection. Well-tested; prerequisite for several other features. Report 3.8

title: Port env-driven boot seeding initializer (vshaveyko env_seed.rb)
description: Idempotent boot seeding of Account/admin/API token/APP_URL/webhook from DOCUSEAL_* env; resilient to missing DB; replaces manual /setup for containerized deploys. Report 3.9

title: Port custom fonts feature (ipuppyyt f59d01ed49)
description: CustomFont model + controllers + font_modal.vue + @font-face injection + PDF embedding hook in generate_result_attachments.rb. Drop junk files, fix migration timestamp, audit upload validation (untrusted binary). Report 3.10

title: Add dark mode toggle (maximus-output docuseal-dark DaisyUI theme)
description: Theme + navbar toggle + localStorage persistence + pre-paint bootstrap (~23 lines). Companion: selective bg-white->bg-base-100 token cleanup (ipuppyyt discipline). Report 3.11

title: Add confidential invite-only public form access (chsdocuseal B8, re-derive)
description: Template preference confidential_access: shared link only works for existing submitter emails; 422 otherwise. Re-derive against current start_form_controller (hot file, fork is 469 behind). Zero tests upstream-side — write specs. Report 3.12

title: Add per-account IP allowlist (developbob B5, with fixes)
description: CIDR/IP allowlist enforced web+API. MUST add: self-lockout guard, shared concern (de-dupe), config caching, specs (none exist). Report 3.14

title: Add signer consent banner (developbob B6 PR16+PR19 together, with fixes)
description: Consent checkbox on last step + consent_given event. MUST port bypass guard PR19 with it; add server-side enforcement, endpoint dedup, fetch error handling, specs. Report 3.14

title: Add auto-archive/data retention job (developbob B8, with fixes)
description: Per-account retention days -> archive old submissions + submission.archived webhook. Non-functional as shipped: add job bootstrap + idempotency lock + specs. Report 3.14

title: Add Send TEST Email button on SMTP settings (docuseal-plus)
description: Modal to send real-SMTP test email with error surfacing; share build_smtp_settings with interceptor instead of copy-paste. Report 3.15

title: Add invitation status badges + resend with expired-throttle bypass (docuseal-plus)
description: User#invitation_status from Devise fields; Status column + Resend button in users index; reset throttle bypassed when invite already expired. Small, clean. Report 3.15

title: Add Quick Send modal on template page (developbob v0.13.0)
description: Single-recipient quick send via Turbo modal. Fix first-submitter-only limitation + dead rescue. Report 3.15

title: Small UX/i18n picks: tour replay button, i18n auto-detect + form language switcher, CSP nonce meta, zh-CN locale
description: Intebec product-tour replay (?tour=true); developbob browser-language auto-detect + signing-form language switcher; acul021 csp-nonce meta for Turbo (safe no-op hardening); new985211 zh-CN locale (i18n.yml + both Vue i18n.js, reconcile keys). Split further if selected. Report 3.15

title: Licensing decision memo: Pro-feature reimplementation policy for this fork
description: Review AGPL-3.0 + LICENSE_ADDITIONAL_TERMS against each Tier 4 candidate (SSO, embedding, teams/RBAC, reminders, SMS, Stripe, bulk send, white-label, template APIs). Decide per-feature go/no-go, and the attribution posture (developbob attribution-when-personalized + wabolabs explicit fork-of attribution are the respectful patterns). Blocks all Tier 4 implementation issues. Report Tier 4 table.

title: GATED: OIDC SSO (acul021 impl: PKCE, identity linking, domain allowlist, role claim)
description: Most coherent SSO in network. omniauth_openid_connect gems, per-account EncryptedConfig, force-SSO, auto-provision as viewer. Untested vs live IdP — test with real IdP. Report Tier 4.

title: GATED: SAML SSO (Deenyoro: Authentik-hardened, ruby-saml >= 1.18.0 CVE pin)
description: Alternative/complement to OIDC. Overlay-packaged; untested vs live IdP. Report Tier 4.

title: GATED: force_sso_auth enforcement (Deenyoro, fail-safe design)
description: Enforces existing upstream setting: disable password login when SSO configured. Lowest-risk Tier 4 item. Depends on an SSO impl. Report Tier 4.

title: GATED: self-hosted embedded builder/form (vshaveyko JWT architecture)
description: JWT token auth + fail-closed EmbedScoped concern + CSP frame-ancestors; spec-covered; static-asset shadowing of Pro stub is the aggressive part. Report Tier 4.

title: GATED: automated email reminders (docuseal-plus flood-guard variant + s256 queue UI)
description: Upstream OSS ships reminder settings UI but no job. docuseal-plus job has downtime flood guard + event dedup; s256 adds queue visibility + skip button. Write specs. Report Tier 4.

title: GATED: SMS invitations (wabolabs 4-provider: BulkVS/Twilio/VoIP.ms/SignalWire)
description: Real sending + request/system specs; de-brand settings form. Report Tier 4.

title: GATED: Stripe payments for payment fields (maximus-output)
description: Checkout + invoice modes with hardening pass. UNTESTED money paths — needs full spec coverage before use. Report Tier 4.

title: GATED: bulk send from CSV/XLSX (maximus-output/iancenry)
description: Spreadsheet-driven bulk submissions; wires existing import_list.vue. Untested. Report Tier 4.

title: GATED: white-label branding w/ attribution-when-personalized (developbob v1.1-1.3; Intebec engine as reference)
description: Custom logo + brand name + the licensing-respectful Powered-by-DocuSeal footer that appears exactly when personalized. Intebec 883-LOC multi-client engine = heavier alternative (excise their licence kill-switch). Report Tier 4.

title: GATED: template-creation APIs (HTML/PDF/DOCX tags) + one-off submission APIs (iancenry F6/F7)
description: Best code quality in that fork; Node render dependency + fonts; no tests. Report Tier 4.

title: GATED: DocuSign template import (iancenry F11: OAuth2 + tab-type field mapping)
description: Cleanest non-trivial iancenry feature; not a Pro feature (migration tool) but DocuSign ToS applies; low licensing risk vs rest of Tier 4. Report Tier 4.

title: GATED: teams/departments RBAC (chsdocuseal departments or acul021 team-folder permissions)
description: Both invasive schema+ability changes; zero-test (chs) / NOT-NULL drop (acul021). Re-derivation project either way. Report Tier 4.
